name: SUNFLOWER
description: The magnificent sunflower stands tall in the golden fields, its bright yellow petals radiating warmth and joy as it faithfully follows the sun across the sky. Symbolizing adoration, longevity, and unwavering loyalty, this stunning flower brings light and positivity wherever it blooms. Its nutritious seeds are a healthy snack loved worldwide, while its beauty inspires artists and gardeners alike. Perfect for brightening any space with its cheerful presence.
